plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Automates creating GitHub releases from the current git repo. Use this skill whenever the user wants to create a release, publish a version, tag a commit for release, generate release notes, or publish to GitHub releases.

plugins.name: test-framework-dev
plugins.description: Develop Ampel functional-test framework projects and ft-amd-style test applications. Use when working on .NET 8 Windows FT apps, FTTest/FTTestStep code, TPF.json configuration, operator GUI integration, submodule wiring, database/login/label-printer/logger integrations, Makefile packaging, or test-framework architecture decisions.
